chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI IST APPEAL NO. 83 / 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING / PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 1948/2024. 2) For orders on Nazir report dated 2.3.2023 & 22.2.2023. 3) For hearing of CMA No. 4434/2022. 4) For orders on office objection / reply “A”. 5) For hearing of main case. 11.12.2024. Mr. Sathi M. Ishaque, Advocate for Appellant. ________________ Not to be fixed before a bench of which one of us Mohammad Abdur Rehman, J, is a Member. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
